title: fumana glutinosa var. hispidula
intro: Fumana glutinosa var. hispidula, also known as the sticky cinquefoil, is a shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions. Fumana glutinosa var. hispidula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
